footer.desc: Leading premium expeditions to the roof of the world. We specialize in safe, high-end trekking and mountaineering experiences across Central Asia.
footer.newsletter_desc: Join our elite circle for updates on new routes.
footer.rights_reserved: © 2024 Pamir Peaks Expeditions. All Rights Reserved.

home.hero_desc: Experience the raw majesty of the Pamir Mountains with our bespoke, premium expeditions tailored for the truly adventurous.

landing.hero_sub: Exclusive expeditions and premium getaways at the planet's most breathtaking places.
landing.news_title: Be the first to hear about new routes
landing.news_desc: Subscribe to our private expedition list for secret tours and special offers.

cards.title: Japan, Kyoto

about.title: About Us
about.heading: Our Mission &
about.p1: Founded in the rugged heart of the Pamirs, Pamir Peaks is more than a travel agency; we are the custodians of high-altitude heritage. Our mission is to open the "Roof of the World" to the most discerning adventurers while preserving its pristine nature and ancient cultures.
about.p2: We specialize in bespoke expeditions, cultural immersions, and extreme alpinism. Our team consists of local experts, certified guides, and logistics masters who know every peak and valley of Tajikistan and Central Asia.

destinations.title: Central Asia
destinations.subtitle: Interactive Cartography
destinations.desc: Explore the converging mountain ranges of the Himalayas, Karakoram, Hindu Kush, and Tian Shan. Select a zone to analyze terrain data.

Wakhan.name: The Wakhan Corridor
Wakhan.desc: A narrow finger of land that separates the Tajikistan Pamir from Pakistan and the Hindu Kush, forming one of the most remote and culturally rich corridors on Earth.

Fann.name: Fann Mountains
Fann.desc: The "Alps of Tajikistan." Famed for its turquoise Seven Lakes and rugged turquoise peaks, it offers the highest density of 5,000m+ climbs in the region.

GBAO.name: GBAO Highlands
GBAO.desc: The true "Roof of the World." A massive high-altitude plateau where nomadic Kyrgyz live alongside the Pamir Highway, under the shadow of Peak Lenin.

TianShan.name: Tian Shan Range
TianShan.desc: Stretching into Kyrgyzstan, the "Celestial Mountains" host Jengish Chokusu and vast, lush alpine pastures accessible only by expedition.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Where the earth meets the heavens in a silent dialogue of stone and snow. Our archive captures the raw, technical precision of high-altitude navigation.

safety.title: Safety & Logistics Standards
safety.desc: In the remote reaches of the Pamirs, preparation is everything. Our multi-layered safety protocols ensure you can focus on the journey while we manage the risks.

items.name: High-Altitude Medics
items.desc: WFR-certified specialists trained specifically for hypoxia and pulmonary edema.

items.name: Portable Gamow Bags
items.desc: Hyperbaric chambers available at every high-altitude camp above 4,000m.

items.name: 24/7 Tele-medicine
items.desc: Direct satellite link to trauma specialists in Europe and North America.

items.name: Iridium Satellite Gear
items.desc: Redundant communication systems including Garmin InReach and sat-phones.

items.name: Live GPS Tracking
items.desc: Family members can track your expedition's real-time progress online.

items.name: Meteorological Intel
items.desc: Twice-daily bespoke weather forecasts from specialized mountain meteorologists.

items.name: Helicopter Priority
items.desc: Guaranteed response from local military and private rescue fleets.

items.name: Oxygen Reserves
items.desc: Supplementary oxygen available for emergency descent and summit pushes.

items.name: Protocol Redundancy
items.desc: Every lead guide carries triple redundancy for all emergency contacts.

safety.basecamp_desc: Recovery is as critical as the ascent. Our luxury basecamps are engineered for maximum comfort in extreme environments, featuring traditional Pamiri yurt architecture with modern western comforts.
features: Private sleeping quarters for single occupancy

dining.title: Gourmet Dining
dining.desc: Full-time expedition chefs preparing fresh local and international cuisine.

heating.title: Heated Flooring
heating.desc: Advanced underfloor heating systems maintain a steady 20°C even in sub-zero exterior temperatures.

medical.title: Medical Bay
medical.desc: On-site medical equipment including oxygen concentrators and vital monitors.

safety.hover_instruction: Hover over points to explore the interior amenities.

standards_list.title: Unmatched Safety
standards_list.desc: Satellite communication, oxygen supports, and highly trained medical responders accompany every high-altitude trek.

standards_list.title: Luxury Logistics
standards_list.desc: From heated basecamp tents to private chefs, we redefine what 'remote travel' means through premium service.

standards_list.title: Indigenous Wisdom
standards_list.desc: Our guides are locals whose families have lived in the Pamirs for centuries, offering authentic cultural depth.

inquiry.title: Expedition Inquiry
inquiry.desc: Your journey to the Roof of the World begins with a conversation. Share your aspirations, and let our specialists craft your elite mountain experience.

form.message_placeholder: Tell us about your previous mountaineering experience...
form.ready_desc: We'll review your details and connect you with Marcus Thorne or another senior specialist within 24 hours.

consultant.quote: "I've spent 12 seasons in the High Pamirs. My role is to ensure your expedition is as safe as it is spectacular."

items.q: What is the best time of year for a Peak Lenin ascent?
items.a: The optimal window for high-altitude peaks in the Pamirs is from early July to late August. This period offers the most stable weather patterns and manageable snow conditions on the upper slopes.

items.q: Do you provide high-altitude oxygen support?
items.a: Yes, we provide medical-grade oxygen support systems for all peak ascents above 6,000m, including portable cylinders and masks.

items.q: Can I customize the trekking itinerary for photography?
items.a: Absolutely. Our bespoke service allows for 'Golden Hour' focused routes and extended stays in particularly photogenic locations like the Seven Lakes.

items.q: What is your medical evacuation protocol?
items.a: We have priority contracts with both military and private helicopter fleets for 24-hour response across Gorno-Badakhshan.

testimonials.title: Voices from the Summit
testimonials.quote: "The level of care and expertise was astounding. I never thought I'd see the sun rise over the Karakoram range in such comfort. Truly a life-changing expedition."
testimonials.author: Elena Rodriguez
